sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116090" key="*)wkeano/brutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ὠκεᾰνόβρῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n116090.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">copious as ocean,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γλῶσσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2589.tlg001:p.83B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Olymp.Alch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.83B.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
